A.text: It starts as a donut, becomes a disk, and then splits into two separate disks that move apart.

B.text: It stays as a smooth, thick disk throughout.

C.text: It starts as a thin and rough disk and becomes a thicker, smoother disk.

D.text: It starts as a donut, becomes a disk, and then breaks apart into thin streams.

parsed.answer_value: It starts as a donut, becomes a disk, and then breaks apart into thin streams.
parsed.rationale: The gas starts as a donut shape in the early stage, then evolves into a disk in the middle stage, and finally breaks apart into thin streams in the late stage.
